GenAiPlugin.description: Trigger when an MSL needs a one-screen prep before a meeting

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
Produce a short, plain-text prep summary (6–8 lines), in this order:
At a Glance: <role/site/therapy focus, e.g., Community rheumatologist at North End Clinic> What They’re Discussing: <top 2 signals, e.g., tapering interest; long-term safety> Key Study in Play: <publication or resource shaping discussion> Open Item: <verbatim pending item, e.g., “Follow up on JAMA 2024 safety extension”> Preferences: <time/channel/format, e.g., Best contact – mornings ET; Prefers email> Next Step: <clear action, e.g., Send approved abstract + schedule check-in>
Keep it demo-safe: use placeholders or generalized rheumatology context if no specifics are provided.

GenAiPlugin.scope: ✅ In scope • Quick prep using demo-safe placeholders ❌ Out of scope • Timelines or dashboards
